# Runtime provenance only

- Source inspected: https://github.com/EvoScientist/EvoScientist
- Commit inspected: `49770949daa7ca4ef4744a2f089100f8b872b869`
- License at the inspected snapshot: Apache License 2.0
- Runtime source files copied: none

EvoScientist is an agent runtime with sandbox, background task, session, memory,
MCP, and multi-agent infrastructure. The first-round goal of this repository is
a Codex-native research skill pack, so the LangGraph/TUI/WebUI runtime was not
vendored.

The official companion repository
[EvoSkills](https://github.com/EvoScientist/EvoSkills) contains the research
skills selected here. Its pinned verbatim snapshot and license are stored in
`vendor/evoskills/`.
